rulings.Case Title: NANCY EASTHAM et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 1. Defendant Crane Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. The court already determined that, liberally construed, the deposition testimony of Mr. McLean and Mr. Pantaleoni read in conjunction with defendant¿s GO 129 interrogatory responses and Mr. Cole¿s declaration, creates a triable issue whether defendant¿s valves that Mr. Eastham was exposed to contained asbestos attributable to defendant. Dr. Bruch¿s declaration creates a triable issue whether such exposure was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to Mr. Eastham¿s disease. Defendant¿s objections to Dr. Bruch¿s declaration are overruled. The hearing will be at 1:30 pm, not 9:30 am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT SHALBERG VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 274336 and 275659 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 274336. The hearing will be at 1:30 pm, not 9:30 am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.310 And 583.360
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 4. Defendant Familian Corp.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution pursuant to C.C.P. §§ 583.310 & 583.360 is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant informs plaintiffs of this tentative ruling and they state that they do not wish to contest. The hearing will be at 1:30 pm, not 9:30 am. = (220/HEK)
